title: Meaty Mild Uruguayan Matcha Beef Skewers
description: A fresh and comforting Uruguayan dish featuring matcha and grilled to perfection, this recipe is dairy-free friendly and perfect for any occasion. The combination of matcha and beef creates a unique and delicious flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together matcha powder, olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the beef strips to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the matcha mixture.
Thread the beef strips onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the beef reaches an internal temperature of 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
Brush the skewers with lemon juice during the last minute of grilling.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
